title: Royal Mistress
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Royal Mistress''''' was a cumbersome-looking medium [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by [[Hawker Bryce-Kelley]] and his co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Rypka]]. Although it was not much to look at, it was Bryce-Kelley's pride and joy as it was relatively fast and maneuverable, and was capable of carrying five hundred metric tons. To protect the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], and possibly others as Bryce-Kelley seemed to do at every opportunity, ''Royal Mistress'' was fitted with a concealed [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannon]]. Because the ship only required a crew of two, Bryce-Kelley and Rypka, it was very rare that they would take on hirelings. Because of Bryce-Kelley's actions in saving many of his fellow free-traders, ''Royal Mistress'' became a welcome sight to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].

==Sources==
